pages.text: Time Period: Late Devonian Period $(br2)Temperament: Hostile $(br2)Diet: Carnivorous $(br2)Preferred Habitats: Deep Ocean Biomes

The Dunkleosteus comes in three sizes: small, medium, and large. While the small Dunkleosteus will not attack on sight, the other two variants will not be so friendly if you get too close. A Dunkleosteus bite is incredibly strong and will pierce through armor
